message:
fix(tests): cast override_node from u64 to f64 in proptest_replay_determinism

DecisionEvent::new() expects Option<f64> for override_node but the
proptest generator produced Option<u64>. Add .map(|v| v as f64) to
match the updated API signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
